# veeam_protection_group (Resource)

Manages a Veeam agent protection group (IndividualComputers or CloudMachines).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Protection group name.
- `type` (String) Protection group type: `IndividualComputers`, `CloudMachines`, etc.

### Optional

- `cloud_account` (Attributes List) Cloud account settings for type `CloudMachines`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_account))
- `cloud_machines` (Attributes List) Cloud object selectors for type `CloudMachines`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_machines))
- `computers` (Attributes List) List of computers in the protection group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--computers))
- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `is_disabled` (Boolean) Whether the protection group is disabled.
- `options` (Attributes List) Optional deployment options for backup agents in this protection group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--options))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Protection group identifier (assigned by the server).

<a id="nestedatt--cloud_account"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_account`

Required:

- `account_type` (String)

Optional:

- `assign_iam_role` (Boolean)
- `credentials_id` (String)
- `region_id` (String)
- `region_type` (String)
- `subscription_id` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--cloud_machines"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_machines`

Required:

- `type` (String)

Optional:

- `name` (String)
- `object_id` (String)
- `value` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--computers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `computers`

Required:

- `connection_type` (String) Connection type: `PermanentCredentials`, `SingleUseCredentials`, or `Certificate`.
- `hostname` (String) FQDN or IP address of the computer.

Optional:

- `credentials_id` (String) Credential ID for the computer. Required with `PermanentCredentials`.


<a id="nestedatt--options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `options`

Optional:

- `application_plugins` (List of String)
- `distribution_repository_id` (String)
- `distribution_server_id` (String)
- `install_application_plugins` (Boolean)
- `install_backup_agent` (Boolean)
- `install_cbt_driver` (Boolean)
- `reboot_if_required` (Boolean)
- `update_automatically` (Boolean)
